description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular design with a matte black finish, reminiscent of medieval great helms. The front is characterized by a pronounced vertical ridge and a narrow, horizontal eye slit, providing limited but focused visibility. The sides are flat and extend forward, creating a protective facial shield, while the back is smoothly rounded for full cranial coverage. Subtle metallic rivets are visible on the front, adding to its armored appearance. The lower edge flares outward slightly, suggesting comfort and stability when worn. The overall construction appears solid and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or modern attachments.
description: A matte black, angular helmet with a narrow eye slit and full head coverage, featuring a robust, medieval-inspired design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertical ridge, narrow eye slit, and rivets on the flat facial shield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the flat, forward-extending faceplate and the smooth, rounded back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the helmet's smooth, rounded dome and flared lower edge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the angular faceplate and seamless back curvature.
